zh.lifeSummary: Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars於1100年之前與wife Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars于1100年之前与wife Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Leuchars
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Lewers
meanings: Scottish: variant of Leuchars, a habitational name from Leuchars in Fife. The placename derives from Gaelic luachar ‘reed, rush’ + the English plural -s.

nameMeanings.name: Ness
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name of unknown origin; borne by a character in Táin Bó Cuailgne (the Cattle Raid of Cooley), the mother of Conchobhar.

variants.name: Neassa
meanings: Traditional name of unknown origin; borne by a character in Táin Bó Cuailgne (the Cattle Raid of Cooley), the mother of Conchobhar.

variants.name: Neasa
meanings: Traditional name of unknown origin; borne by a character in Táin Bó Cuailgne (the Cattle Raid of Cooley), the mother of Conchobhar.

variants.name: Vanessa
meanings: Name invented by Jonathan Swift ( 1667–1745 ) for his friend Esther Vanhomrigh . It seems to have been derived from the first syllable of her (Dutch) surname, with the addition of the suffix -essa (perhaps influenced by the first syllable of her given name). The name became fairly popular in the 20th century, being borne for example by the actress Vanessa Redgrave ( b. 1937 ).

nameMeanings.name: FitzWilliam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name William .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: Either a short form of any of the numerous names representing a transferred use of a surname formed with the Anglo-Norman French prefix fi(t)z ‘son of ’, as for example Fitzgerald , Fitzroy , or a transferred use of the surname Fitz, which may be of the same derivation, but applied originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same given name, or a local name from Fitz in Shropshire, named with the Old English personal name Fitt + hōh ‘hill spur’.

en.lifeSummary: Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars married wife Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars before 1100, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars a épousé wife Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars avant 1100, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars hat vor 1100 in Europa wife Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars lui sposato wife Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars prima del 1100, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Ness FitzWilliam of Leucharsは1100年以前にヨーロッパでwife Ness FitzWilliam of Leucharsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars(은)는 1100년 이전 우럽에서 wife Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars casou-se com wife Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars antes 1100, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars женился на женщине по имени wife Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars перед 1100 г. в местности Европа. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars se casó con wife Ness FitzWilliam of Leuchars antes de 1100, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
